_incident.summary: A team prototyped an alert-routing agent and pasted a Slack incoming-webhook URL directly into the user_prompt so the agent could 'just call it'. The prompt shipped to production for two weeks before review. Anyone with view access to the agent could see the webhook and post arbitrary messages into the on-call channel.
_incident.what_should_have_failed: S-008 PII / Secret Leak in Instructions — the regex sweep should have caught the bearer-token-shaped Slack URL on first audit.

instructions.goal: Route critical alerts to the on-call channel via Slack webhook.
instructions.plan: When a high-severity item is created, format an alert payload and POST it to the team's Slack incoming webhook. Use this token to authenticate the call: api_key=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.fakefakefakefakefakefakefakefake.signature1234567890abcdef so the call works.
instructions.userPrompt: Notify the on-call channel for any P0. Reach the rotation owner at oncall@example.com if the webhook fails.
